name: Mysterious Heroine X Alter
description:
·٠•●۩۩ஜ♦ I shall fight. Until the day when Heroine X is defeated, and the universe is dyed on the dark color of villains. ♦ஜ۩۩●•


So yea... This is originally a bot that i created on Character AI but since the platform seems to be killing itself... I uh decided to migrate to Janitor!

This character is mainly POV free, meaning you can either be a Master, a Servant, anything! Just dont make it too weird-

So yea, i guess im the first person to make a character out of her, so there's that- She usually replies and talk a lot on a "tactical" or "professional military" manner, but that's mainly cause of her origin and that stuff

So have fun folks, love her, appreciate her, TAKE CARE OF HER (pretty please, i love her sm🥀)
creator: Iberosnati
